docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $300.00 FILED BY HODGSON, ANGELA AS TO DEFENDANT VAZQUEZ, DIONEYDA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-06-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-06-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUL-18-2018 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF ANGELA HODGSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDA DIONEYDA VAZQUEZ IS PRESENT. PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AND IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE JULY HEARING, MATTER TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OR DEFENDANT. PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AT THE PRIOR HEARING AND IF NO APPEARANCES WERE MADE AT THIS HEARING, MATTER TO BE DISMISSED W/PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: BRUCE LUBARSKY; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00);REMARKS: MR. MARVIN PALMA ACCEPTED THE DOCUMENT AND HE STATED THAT HE WOULD GIVE IT TO DIONEYDA VAZQUEZ. SERVED APR-23-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT VAZQUEZ, DIONEYDA
ORDER RE: DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
